mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, provider, external_id, bind_status, last_login_time, remark, create_time, update_time FROM user_oauth_bind WHERE provider = #{provider} AND external_id = #{externalId} AND bind_status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_oauth_bind ( user_id, provider, external_id, bind_status, last_login_time, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{provider}, #{externalId}, #{bindStatus}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT IGNORE INTO user_oauth_bind ( user_id, provider, external_id, bind_status, last_login_time, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{provider}, #{externalId}, #{bindStatus}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW() )
